memberdef.name: kFogValues
memberdef.initializer: = { {"0", 0}, {"1", 0x3f800000}, {"10", 0x41200000}, {"100", 0x42c80000}, {"1000", 0x447a0000}, {"-1.24", 0xbf9eb852}, {"-10.75", 0xc12c0000}, {"Inf", posInf}, {"-Inf", negInf}, {"NanQ", posNanQ}, {"-NanQ", negNanQ}, {"NanS", posNanS}, {"-NanS", negNanS}, {"Max", posMax}, {"-Max", negMax}, {"MinNorm", posMinNorm}, {"-MinNorm", negMinNorm}, {"MaxSubn", posMaxSubNorm}, {"-MaxSubn", negMaxSubNorm}, {"MinSubn", posMinSubNorm}, {"-MinSubn", negMinSubNorm}, }

memberdef.name: kFogModes
